[![Picture](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/editor/austin-metal-buildings.png?1513106438)](tel:2546135024) [Get a Quote!](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/contact-us.html) Texas Metal Buildings, LLC strives to deliver outstanding products and delight our customers with our service. Our approach recognizes the wants and needs of our customers and we respond to those needs with years of experience and a broad and diverse understanding of the industry.  We are Metal Buildings Texas! * * * **We specialize in Metal Carports ― Metal Garages ― Metal Horse Barns ― Metal RV Covers ― Metal Storage Buildings - Built on Site Metal Storage Buildings** ​ **Our products are available in San Antonio, Austin, Round Rock, Waco, Houston, Dallas, Fort Worth and all towns in between.** * * * | | | | --- | --- | | Personal and recreational auto carports, steel barns and RV covers are among the many items that people rely on to protect their valuables and most treasured possessions. Possessions and investments are an essential portion of the livelihood of most people, and quality forms of protection for these investments is necessary. Protection against inclement weather, hail and the harsh sun is imperative to ensuring the longevity and value retention of recreational vehicles and personal belongings. | Best Metal Buildings in CTX - YouTube
Tap to unmute
[Best Metal Buildings in CTX](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DPMgFZfrIBw) [Kingdom Strategic TV](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCoQIsvPeWtbgFroHreeNh4Q)
Kingdom Strategic TV18 subscribers | We provide superior protection for customers across the state of Texas. As a leading supplier of metal barns, carports, RV covers, metal garages and other metal buildings for protection or storage, we have extensive knowledge of and work diligently to meet our customers demands. For your convenience, we offer both wholesale and retail sales and you can purchase through one of our distributors too. We know the importance of protecting your valuables and assets at home or  in business and we've paved the way for consumers to find the right products that over deliver. Our customer service standards are the highest in the industry and we believe in treating all of our customers like they are our only customer. We are dedicated to delivering an excellent and delightful experience from the initial consultation to post-delivery and installation. Our commitment to our customer extends far beyond the point of sale, to ensure that you receive the ver best quality of service and customer care. ​ Modern steel garages, steel carports, steel barns and steel RV covers are the best mode of protection from weather and other hazardous conditions of the environment including acidic rain, chemicals and more. In addition, to protecting valuables, livestock can be protected with the use of our technologically advanced metal barns. Today, many people seek contemporary measures of protection for their goods, valuables, and investments. The days of using wood are fading due to the lasting durability, low maintainence and efficient cost of metal storage buildings. [![Picture](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/metal-building-financing-texas_3_orig.png)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/financing.html) * * * [![Picture](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/editor/austin-metal-buildings_1.png)](tel:2546135024) **High-Quality Carports and RV Covers** We offer elite metal carports with a variety of measurements and designs to choose from. We understand that customers have varying needs for us to accommodate, and we strive to deliver options to satisfy all of those needs. Each one of our products are manufactured with the highest quality materials available and they can be customized to meet your specifications. Carports are a fantastic and cost effective solution to protecting your vehicles from the elements and damaging UV rays of the sun. When purchasing from us you completely eliminate the need to consult and hire contractors to assemble the product on your property. We make it as simple as deciding how much space you need to cover, what size and material you prefer, and our team of experienced metal building constructors will erect your metal building quickly and perfectly. Many consumers don’t realize the number of options they have for protection of their cars, boats, RV's and other items. There are a wide variety of color choices available, and customization options that most homeowners and businesses find accommodating to their needs and desires.  Consider the color of the home or business property of which the carport, steel building or metal barn will be placed. Choosing a building style and color that will complement the home or business with which it shares a space will maintain and aesthetic appeal and offer value to the property. ![Picture](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/carports-and-metal-buildings-texas-130-mph-warranty_orig.jpg) **Metal Garages** For properties without a garage, these steel garages are the perfect option. In fact, there are a few advantages that the metal garage structure has over a traditional wooden building. Once the consideration or decision to purchase arrives, consider the following benefits of owning a metal garage. **Price** The option to save money long term without sacrificing quality is what these metal garages present as an advantage. They are constructed of metal, which is an insect and weather resistant material that will last for many decades. The traditional wooden garage can cost significantly more than the metal or steel building. Erector set type assembly makes this contemporary option more feasible for many consumers. In addition, on site assembly is included in the price of most buildings! **Flexibility In Metal Buildings** The flexibility and customizable capabilities make our metal garages more popular than any other type. They are easy to have installed and can be placed on almost any level surface on your property. These metal buildings can also be easily attached to existing structures on the property. The convenience and cost-savings are substantial, and regarding future customized add-ons that customers may wish to implement, they can be done at any time. Customizing the traditional wooden garage could cost more and require contracting professionals to complete the task, which significantly adds to the cost. **Safety and Convenience** Metal garages, metal horse barns, metal RV covers, and steel buildings are manufactured to be resistant to rust, with baked on siliconized paint and two different gauges of steel to enhance it's strength. Modern steel manufacturing techniques produce longer lasting materials and modern paints not only make them look good, but virtually eliminate maintenance.  Wood structures are subject to warping, cracking, rotting and mold. Another destructive culprit of wooden garages are termites or other insects that may feed on or cause infestation that destroys the wood. [![](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/standard-regular-style.jpg)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/standard-regular-style_orig.jpg) [![](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/standard-boxed-eave-style.jpg)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/standard-boxed-eave-style_orig.jpg) [![](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/standard-vertical-style.jpg)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/standard-vertical-style_orig.jpg) [![Picture](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/editor/austin-metal-buildings_2.png)](tel:2546135024) **METAL GARAGES** Here are a few other advantages of metal buildings over wooden structures: | | | | --- | --- | | - Easier to clean
- Take less time to dry
- Long-lasting color without the need to repaint over time | ![Picture](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/metal-garage-san-antonio_orig.jpeg) | As your search for a quality and accommodating building process, remember that steel buildings offer a variety of advantages in safety, value, convenience, as well as versatility, to which wooden structures have no comparison. Metal barns offer a resourcefulness and convenience, unparalleled by any traditional barn. Our products are constructed with superior quality U.S. steel and offer a superior standard of strength, flexibility and a contemporary appearance. The added convenience of quick assembly and minor maintenance makes this unit ideal for the storage and protection of farm equipment, agricultural machinery, livestock, hay and more. Your animals and equipment are safe from the elements and other environmental dangers. Protect your investment with covers that shield and protect your RV. Extensive exposure to the sun, storms, hail, rain, bird droppings and more, can cause wear and tear on your recreational vehicle. | | | | --- | --- | | [Learn more about our Garages](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/garages.html) | [Got questions? Contact us!](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/contact-us.html) | [![Picture](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/central-texas-metal-buildings_orig.png)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/gallery.html) **Why Steel And Not A Portable Building?** Portable buildings have been a popular choice vs. paying the storage space companies each month and are much more common today than ever. The advantages presented by this type of building structure today make ownership, upkeep, and convenience an easy adjustment and a major purchase motivation for many. The drawback is size, because you can only build them wide enough to travel down a road for delivery.  Space is limited to the width and length restrictions. Our metal structures offer you the abilty to have multiple configurations, varied spaces, fully enclosed, partially enclosed and completely open. Workshops, craft rooms, storage spaces, warehouses, garages, carports, barns and more are all made possible with the help of steel structures. The longevity and ability to withstand strong wind and heavy downpours of rain make these units the obvious choice. Durability and strength are the primary advantages. They are manufactured to house and secure valuable items such as tools, lawn equipment, gardening essentials and more. The attractiveness factor is not to be overlooked either. Long gone are the days where the only color choices available were various shades of dull grey, white or fake aluminum paint. Today the color variety is extensive, which makes it easy to choose the perfect color of your choice. Enhanced color selections are a great addition to any landscaped property, as it contributes to the overall beauty of the space or property. Even if your general need is to have additional storage space, having that storage space while looking good is even better. Regardless of whether your portable storage building is on a residential or a commercial property, aesthetics are still important to most of us. Our metal carports, metal garages, metal barns, metal RV covers and triple wide metal buildings are ideal solutions for most personal and business needs. Sizes vary, which make it easy to fit into a variety of garden, lawn or business spaces. The ability to customize your portable storage building makes them a favorite over attached or permanent storage structures. It is more valuable to have variable configurations than to be forced to choose from premanufactured portable storage sheds that offer no flexibility in design or size. * * * ![Picture](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/published/central-texas-metal-buildings-styles.png?1520632142) **[Carports](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/carports.html):** Regular, Boxed Eave, Vertical **[Garages](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/garages.html):** Regular, Boxed Eave, Vertical, All Vertical **[Barns](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/metal-barns.html):** Regular, Boxed Eave, Vertical, All Vertical **[Triple Wide](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/triple-wide.html):** Regular, Boxed Eave, Vertical, All Vertical **[RV Covers](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/rv-covers.html):** Regular, Boxed Eave, Vertical * * * ![Picture](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/published/central-texas-metal-buildings-options.png?1513270455) **Options for our Carports, Garages, RV Covers and Barns include but are not limited to the following:** 14-gauge or Heavier 12-gauge sq. Tubing Frame 29-gauge or Heavier 26-gauge Steel Panels Siding: Horizontal or Vertical Seams Roll-up Doors: 6’x7’, 8’x8’, 9’x8’, 10’x8’, 10’x10’ or 12’x12’ * * * [![](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/red-metal-horse-barn-austin.jpg)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/red-metal-horse-barn-austin_orig.jpg) [![](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/metal-barns-san-antonio.jpg)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/metal-barns-san-antonio_orig.jpg) [![](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/metal-barns-austin.jpg)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/metal-barns-austin_orig.jpg) [![](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/metal-barns-san-antonio-2.jpg)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/metal-barns-san-antonio-2_orig.jpg) [![Picture](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/editor/austin-metal-buildings_3.png)](tel:2546135024) **Consumer Satisfaction** Our ultimate goal is to deliver a high quality and extreme satisfaction in all the steel buildings we manufacture. We understand that the requirements of our customers are rapidly changing, and our products are designed to accommodate those changes. The demand for these products has increased dramatically over the years, as metal barns, metal carports and metal RV covers have become ideal for both private and business use. The extensive number of uses for metal structures is growing each day and include simple storage space, a workshop, garage, livestock housing, warehouse space, commercial business space and more. Metal buildings can be erected on your site quickly so that you can be up and running in no time. Steel building assemblies can be customized, which makes it easy to adjust them to accommodate changing needs or to reflect desired styles. Our company offers many different options to accommodate almost every need imaginable. We value and understand the extensive convenience that metal buildings offer our customers. We have a unique selection of small to large units for sale as well everything in between. Our experts are ready to answer your questions and explain the various metal buildings that we offer, their options and how the installation works. We provide service to consumers near and far with options to make their metal building needs affordable and realistic in design, delivery and construction. Consumers should be presented with products and services they can use and appreciate. Metal buildings, carports, metal garages, RV carports, and metal barns offer flexible options that no longer place limitations on buildings for both private and commercial projects. Contemporary models complement the existing structures that most homeowners and business owners prefer. We also offer very competitive financing through our financial partner with rates and terms that fit most needs. **​TYPES OF TRIPLE WIDE RV COVERS WE OFFER** [![](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/triple-wide-regular-style.jpg)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/triple-wide-regular-style_orig.jpg) [![](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/triple-wide-boxed-eave-style.jpg)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/triple-wide-boxed-eave-style_orig.jpg) [![](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/triple-wide-vertical-style.jpg)](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/triple-wide-vertical-style_orig.jpg) **Interested in our products?** **Call us now!** [![Picture](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/uploads/1/1/4/1/114145895/published/austin-metal-buildings_4.png)](tel:2546135024) | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Austin

[Privacy Policy](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/privacy-policy.html) - [Privacy Policy](https://www.carportsandmetalbuildingsctx.com/privacy-policy.html) carport, carports alu, carport i aluminium, barn, old english, commercial metal building, custom metal buildings, vertical roof, free delivery, certification, steel building, request price, required central texas metal buildings, metal buildings central texas, custom metal barns, metal buildings austin, steel buildings austin tx, texas metal building, carports austin tx, texas metal buildings, texas steel buildings, metal buildings texas, metal buildings of texas ## Types of Metal Buildings Offered At Texas Metal Buildings, we provide a diverse range of metal structures designed to cater to various needs. Our offerings include metal carports, garages, barns, RV covers, and storage buildings, each engineered for durability and functionality. Whether you need a simple shelter for your vehicle or a spacious barn for livestock, our metal buildings are customizable to fit your specific requirements. Each type of building is constructed with high-quality U.S. steel, ensuring long-lasting protection against harsh weather conditions. For instance, our metal carports come in different styles such as regular, boxed eave, and vertical, allowing customers to choose the design that best complements their property. Additionally, our garages and barns can be tailored with various features, including roll-up doors and different siding options, to enhance both utility and aesthetics. ## Benefits of Choosing Metal Over Wood Metal buildings offer numerous advantages compared to traditional wooden structures, making them an increasingly popular choice among homeowners and businesses alike. One of the primary benefits is their superior durability; metal is resistant to pests, rot, and weather-related damage, ensuring that your investment remains protected for years to come. Moreover, metal buildings require significantly less maintenance than wooden ones, which often need regular painting and repairs. The advanced manufacturing techniques used in creating our steel structures not only enhance their strength but also contribute to a clean, modern appearance that can be customized to suit any style. This combination of low maintenance and high durability makes metal buildings a practical and cost-effective solution for various storage and protection needs. ## Customization Options Available Texas Metal Buildings understands that every customer has unique preferences and requirements. That's why we offer extensive customization options for our metal structures, allowing you to create a building that truly reflects your needs. From selecting the size and layout to choosing colors and additional features, the possibilities are nearly limitless. For example, our customers can choose from a variety of gauge options for the frame and panels, ensuring that their building meets specific strength requirements. Additionally, color choices range from classic neutrals to vibrant hues, enabling you to match your building with your home or business aesthetics. With our expert guidance, you can design a metal building that not only serves its purpose but also enhances the overall look of your property. ## Customer Satisfaction and Support At Texas Metal Buildings, customer satisfaction is our top priority. We are committed to providing exceptional service from the initial consultation through the installation process and beyond. Our knowledgeable team is always ready to assist you, answering any questions and helping you navigate the various options available for your metal building. We also recognize that customer needs can change over time, which is why our structures are designed for flexibility and adaptability. Whether you decide to expand your space or modify the building's features, our metal buildings can easily accommodate those changes. Our dedication to quality and service ensures that you will be completely satisfied with your purchase, making us a trusted partner in your building journey.

##### 10% off Greenhouses & Pavilions \| 20% off Lawn Furniture \| Now Until April 24th \| [Shop Sale](http://www.lonestarstructures.com/inventory)

### DESIGN YOUR OWN METAL CARPORT, GARAGE, BARN, OR RV COVER TODAY!

![](https://lonestarstructures.b-cdn.net/wp-content/uploads/Carports/carport-in-texas.jpeg)

#### CUSTOM OPTIONS

- Custom sizing: choose from 12’x20′ to 50’x100′
- Custom colors: choose from over 14 different colors
- Custom styles: choose a carport, garage, barn, RV cover, loafing shed, or combo unit

[Design a carport](http://www.lonestarstructures.com/3d-carport-designer/)

Lone Star Structures is an authorized dealer of Castle Metal buildings to bring metal carports to you. These metal structures are constructed out of high-quality steel and trim work so that they can stand up to the high demands of everyday use. These carports can be customized to any one of 14 colors and can even be combined to give you the look that you desire.

Comes with paint and shingle colors of your choice!

Free delivery in Texas!

[Design a carport](http://www.lonestarstructures.com/3d-carport-designer/)

## **Easy Financing Available for Storage Sheds & More!**

Looking for an affordable way to bring home your perfect structure? Our new financing option makes it easier than ever to get what you need—without the wait.

- **Fast, simple application**: Choose your terms and get approval status quickly.
- **No money handling required**: Our financing partner pays us directly.
- **Hassle-free coordination**: The finance company handles order confirmation and payment.
- **All products qualify**: Financing applies to sheds, cabins, kennels, and more
- **Alternative to a Credit Card**: For some customers, this is a more manageable alternative to [Rent-To-Own](http://www.lonestarstructures.com/rent-to-own) or credit card payments.

[See Financing Options](https://express-fin.com/application-form/?recordId=001UR00000QhZQCYA3)

## PHOTO GALLERY

- [![metal garages for sale near austin texas](https://lonestarstructures.b-cdn.net/wp-content/uploads/Carports/Metal-garages-for-sale-near-austin-texas-768x576.png)](https://lonestarstructures.b-cdn.net/wp-content/uploads/Carports/Metal-garages-for-sale-near-austin-texas.png)

top of page

Skip to Main Content

![Concrete Facade](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/d05d3b5e9b8c442f8616127098f1e7b0.jpg/v1/fill/w_584,h_1200,al_c,q_85,enc_avif,quality_auto/d05d3b5e9b8c442f8616127098f1e7b0.jpg)

## Metal Buildings for Every Purpose

We proudly represent the two top metal-building manufacturers in Texas: Bedrock Structures and Eagle Carports.

​

Customized to your needs, metal buildings are constructed on-site by experienced contractors for the two companies.

​

First, click on the provided links below to begin designing your building.  You will receive an estimated price, a copy of your order.  We will reach out to confirm your order, and schedule a site visit to assure suitability of placement.

​

Once you have approved your design, you place a deposit for the structure with Trees of Central Texas.  We confirm your order with the manufacturer and they schedule your installation. Upon completion, the remainder of the balance is paid to the installers.

​

You may also stop by (appointments preferred) and we will design together.

[![Bedrock Structures Examples](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/731c0a_fcf2a2a33fd440b9baa93830800df5a8~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_969,h_456,al_c,q_90,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/731c0a_fcf2a2a33fd440b9baa93830800df5a8~mv2.png)](https://carportview.bedrockstructures.com/?dealer=trees-of-central-texas)

## BEDROCK STRUCTURES

Bedrock Structures is a subsidiary of General Shelters of Texas, bringing over 50 years of manufacturing expertise to your build.

​

Bedrock Structures use 4 inch galvanized steel posts for your building.  Anchored in with concrete, Bedrock Structures offer a 20 foot gap between posts. This allows for greater access from the sides, eliminating the ground rail used in Eagles Carport's buildings.

​

Built with 29 gauge steel sides and roofs, Bedrock offers a forty year warranty versus rust or corrosion.  26 gauge steel is available if requested at extra cost.

​

Bedrock Structures also offers red-steel construction for larger, specialty buildings.  Red-steel buildings follow a different cost structure.

​

Click on the link below \[BEDROCK STRUCTURES...\] to start designing your Bedrock Structure:

​

​

[**Bedrock Structures online builder** \\
Bedrock Structures online builderBedrock Structures online builderBedrock Structures online builder](https://carportview.bedrockstructures.com/?dealer=trees-of-central-texas)

![Bedrock Structures Information Flyer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/731c0a_a51cd154c08544fc9ba8bd5d8a490bbb~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_596,h_771,al_c,q_90,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/731c0a_a51cd154c08544fc9ba8bd5d8a490bbb~mv2.png)

## EAGLE CARPORTS

Eagle Carports is a giant in the metal building industry, with presence in 20 southern states.

​

With a manufacturing facility in Nagodoches, Eagle Carports offers the experienced do-it-yourselfer the option to have materials delivered, or to pick-up at their facility for you to construct your building. Otherwise, experienced contractors will expertly assemble your building about a month after you approve your design.

​

Eagle Carports are built using 14 guage 2.5 inch tubing, with side posts every 5 feet and anchored onto a bottom rail.  They feature 29 gauge steel for standard construction, with 26 gauge available at an extra cost.

​

Click the link below to begin building to customize your building. You will be emailed your selection with a quote estimate.  We will receive a copy and reach out to confirm your order.

​

Please call or [email](mailto:johna@treesofcentraltexas.com?subject=Metal%20building%20questions) us with questions and to talk about your building.

​

​

[**Eagle Carports online builder** \\
Eagle Carports online builderEagle Carports online builderEagle Carports online builder](https://build.eaglecarports.com/?dealer=D0015207-MAIN)

# Metal Carports Austin, TX

## Lowest Industry Pricing

[(833) 236-6386](tel:+18332366386)

Pay Only a Small Deposit to order yours!

## Purchase your carport in Austin, TX!

[3D Online Shop](https://carportview.nelsonsbuildings.com/?utm_source=Nelson%27s%20Buildings&utm_medium=Austin%20TX%20Online%20Customizer%20Banner%20Button%20Top)

![Shop Austin Texas Carports TX](https://nelsonsbuildings.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/08/Shop-Texas-Carports-TX.jpg)

## Carports Austin, Texas

Metal carports are versatile structures that can be used to house your vehicles. They also offer many other benefits, including protecting your vehicles from the sun, wind, rain, and hail so that they will retain their value and last much longer. Metal carports are versatile and can be used for nearly any purpose that you might imagine. When you are thinking about purchasing a metal carport in Austin, Texas for your home or business, Nelson’s Buildings offers a huge catalog of building designs and sizes to meet your needs.

* * *

## Build Your Own Metal Building Online

[Let's Build.](https://carportview.nelsonsbuildings.com/?utm_source=Nelson%27s%20Buildings&utm_medium=Austin%20TX%20Online%20Customizer%20Button&utm_campaign=Let%27s%20Build%20Button)

* * *

[![Austin, Texas Custom Metal Carports Online Customizer, Buy Online.](https://nelsonsbuildings.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/metal-carport-building-online-visualizer-customizer.gif)](https://carportview.nelsonsbuildings.com/?utm_source=Nelson%27s%20Buildings&utm_medium=Austin%20TX%20Online%20Customizer%20GIF)

[**Visual Online Customizer**](https://carportview.nelsonsbuildings.com/?utm_source=Nelson%27s%20Buildings&utm_medium=Austin%20TX%20Online%20Customizer%20GIF%20Link)

## Carport roof styles in Austin, TX

Texans who want to purchase metal carports need to know about the different roof styles. In addition to giving carports different looks, the different roof styles also vary in their strength. Here are the three roof styles that you can find in Austin, Texas from Nelson’s Buildings.

- ### Regular Roof Carports

- ### Boxed Eave Roof Carports

- ### Vertical Roof Carports


![Texas Carports TX](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201200%20750'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Austin, Texas Carports – Regular Roof Style

### Regular roof carports in Austin, Texas

Regular roof carports have traditional gambrel-style roofs with rounded ages. These roofs are built out of galvanized steel, which makes them strong and durable for people in Texas.

The regular roof carports at Nelson’s Buildings are the most economical and the most popular among Austin, Texas residents. They are great to use to protect your vehicles or to use for shade from the sun’s harmful rays.

You can customize your regular roof carport by choosing your preferred size, height, and color. Nelson’s Buildings offers free delivery and installation services throughout Austin, TX. When you order your regular roof carport today and pay a small deposit, you will be able to enjoy its benefits in no time.

![Texas Metal Carports](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201200%20750'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Austin, Texas Carports – Boxed Eave Roof Style

### Boxed-eave roof carports in Austin, Texas

Boxed eave roof carports are our mid-range option. These carports cost a little more than our regular roof carports in Austin, Texas because they are even stronger and more durable.

Our boxed eave roof carports have A-frame roofs with steel panels supporting the roofs that run lengthwise across them. They also have extra steel linings running along the sides for more support. Austin, Texas residents love the sturdiness of the frames and the dependability of these carports.

The boxed eave roof carports are simple to set up, but you will not have to worry about it when you order your carport in Austin, Texas from Nelson’s Buildings. We offer free delivery and installation services for every purchase in Texas.

![Texas Carports Sale Shop Online](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201200%20750'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Austin, Texas Carports – Vertical Roof Style

### Vertical roof carports in Austin, Texas

Our top-of-the-line steel carport for Austin, Texas residents is the vertical roof carport. This carport is the heaviest-duty carport that we offer and can withstand heavy snow, ice, hail, and rain.

The vertical roof carports have A-frame roofs with vertical ridges running from the top of the roofs to the sides. This feature allows snow and rain to fall off of the roof instead of piling or pooling during Texas storms.

To provide more strength, the vertical roof carports have steel panels that are laid side by side and steel linings underneath the panels. This carport is worth your investment because of its ability to protect your valuable property in Austin, Texas.

![Boxed Eave Roof Style Carport Nelson's Buildings](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20600%20162'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Boxed Eave Roof Style Carport

## How do boxed eave roof carports differ from vertical roof carports?

![Vertical Roof Style Carport Nelson's Buildings](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20600%20162'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Vertical Roof Style Carport

Some Austin, Texas residents are unclear about how the boxed eave roof and vertical roof carports differ from each other. The boxed eave roof carports have horizontal ridges that run lengthwise across the roof. By contrast, the vertical roof carports have vertical ridges that run from the top of the roof to the sides and panels that are installed side by side.

[Questions? Click to Call Now Toll Free!](tel:+18332366386)

## Buy Metal Carports in Austin, TX

Buying a metal carport in Austin, Texas can help you protect your cars, SUVs, trucks, RVs, ATVs, and agricultural equipment from the weather and elements. Having a metal carport installed on your property can also increase the value of your property and provide you with a strong return on investment. Purchasing a metal carport is a big decision since it will likely be installed next to your home. However, buying a carport is a great decision because of the many benefits you can enjoy from your new carport. Nelson’s Buildings offers affordable metal carports to people in Austin that are constructed from premium-quality metal. We also offer enclosed garages, lean-tos, and clear-span metal buildings. All of your buildings come with free delivery and installation on your property.

## Metal Carports Prices Austin, TX

If you are wanting to purchase a metal carport in Austin but are concerned about the potential cost, the steel buildings at Nelson’s Buildings are among the most affordable structures and often cost less than a storage unit or another type of building. Each type of metal carport that we offer provides our customers with substantial value. However, building prices differ based on different features and factors.

The dimensions and style of your carport will factor into its cost, including the length, width, height, and roof style. If you add other features, including walk-in doors, garage doors, extra mobile home anchors to anchor the structure to a foundation, or insulation, each of these additional features will add to the price. When you want to park your vehicles and equipment under a carport to protect them in Austin, Texas, buying a metal carport from Nelson’s Buildings can provide you with a nearly maintenance-free solution for your needs as compared to a wooden building.

[Questions? Click to Call Now Toll Free!](tel:+18332366386)

## Benefits of Metal Carports in Austin, TX

Buying a high-quality metal carport can offer multiple benefits. Steel carports have an average lifespan of 30 to 40 years with little maintenance required. This means that you can enjoy your carport for decades to come. Metal structure designs are also flexible. We can help you design a carport that will fit the aesthetics of your home and offer a broad variety of colors, features, sizes, and roof styles. Metal structures are manufactured in components that are then used to make a complete structure. Each part is separate, allowing greater flexibility when the buildings are designed.

Buying a metal carport is a much more economical choice than building a wooden structure. Wood is expensive and requires a lot of maintenance. In many cases, building a wooden structure will cost as much as two times the amount that you would have paid for a metal structure. Metal costs less and involves very little maintenance. When you want to add an enclosed garage, horse barn, or carport in Austin, Texas, steel is preferable to wood. The lower maintenance costs of steel buildings and carports mean that you will spend much less money over time. You don’t have to worry about insect damage, decay, shrinkage, swelling, splitting, or twisting when you choose a steel building or carport from Nelson’s Buildings.

Nelson’s Buildings also offers custom-building options to our customers in Austin, Texas. Some of these options include the building’s size, the option to add sides and custom ends that can be half-closed, open, fully-enclosed, or gabled, a roll-up garage door, a window, or a walk-in door, and a variety of different colors to complement your home’s design. Our customized building designs can meet your needs while also being affordable. This means that buying a building from Nelson’s Buildings can fit within your budget.

Some of the other benefits of buying a metal carport in Austin, Texas from Nelson’s Buildings include the following:

- Environmentally friendly
- Protection against damage to your vehicles and objects from the sun, wind, hail, rain, and other elements
- Protection against theft
- Versatility to be used for any purpose
- Extra storage space
- Great shaded area for socializing outside
- Our buildings are constructed out of high-quality American steel, helping to keep them from being easily damaged.

[Questions? Click to Call Now Toll Free!](tel:+18332366386)

## Placing an Order in Austin, TX

The building experts at Nelson’s Buildings can help you to identify your needs for the building and advise you about the right type of structure to meet your needs. We can help you to determine whether a metal carport, clear-span building, enclosed metal garage, or another type of structure will work the best for you. You can choose the roof style and decide if you want your metal carport to be open, half-closed, or fully enclosed. Once you have chosen the important features of your building, you can pick a color for your metal carport or building. You will then be ready to make your purchase in Austin, Texas. We only require a small deposit for you to order your building and allow you to repay your balance upon the installation. We will process your order as quickly as possible and schedule our free delivery and installation services to meet your needs.

## Metal Carport Installation in Austin, TX

Before your metal carport installation, it is important to make certain that the land underneath it is leveled. If the installation site is not leveled, it can cause problems, including trouble cleaning your carport, having entry doors that do not properly close, and trouble squaring your building. If you do not level your installation site, the installation crew will have to do it for you. This could cost extra money on top of the building’s purchase price. Your installation surface will also affect the price of your building. If your installation site has a concrete base, we will use concrete anchors when your building is installed. It is always recommended to anchor your metal carport whether the base is gravel, asphalt, soil, or concrete. When you choose Nelson’s Buildings, you will receive the best-quality carport and free delivery and installation in Austin, Texas. Our team of expert installation professionals will assemble your pre-fabricated metal carport on your site and install it for you.

[Questions? Click to Call Now Toll Free!](tel:+18332366386)

## Metal Carport Warranty in Austin, TX

When you are purchasing a metal carport or garage from Nelson’s Buildings in Austin, Texas, you will benefit from our 20-year limited warranty on rust-through of frames as long as you have performed routine care and maintenance. However, you should not alter your unit after you purchase it because doing so can void the warranty.

If you are considering a metal carport for your home or business in Austin, Nelson’s Buildings is the top choice. We have more than two decades of experience and can professionally meet your needs. Contact us today to learn more about our metal carport and building solutions by calling us at tool free [(833) 236-6386](tel:(833) 236-6386).

metadata.og:description: Buying a metal carport in Austin, TX from Nelson's Buildings can allow you to enjoy numerous benefits. We can provide you with open metal carports, full or half-closed garages, horse barns, RV covers, clear span and commercial metal buildings. Metal carports from Nelson's Buildings in Austin, Texas are great solutions for homes and businesses. You can choose from a huge selection of sizes, heights, widths, and lengths to help you accomplish your goals. Our metal carports come in many different colors and designs so that they can complement your existing buildings or home. You can also enjoy additional features, including rolling garage doors, walk-in doors, windows, and more. All of our carports are constructed out of high-quality U.S. steel and can be expected to last for decades. Nelson's Buildings offers free installation and delivery of your carport or metal building and only requires a minimum deposit when you order.
